description: Internal orchestrator and Reaper-entity experiments, consuming the routing spine and emitting internal request envelopes.

POL002_NoRawNarrativeInTier.description: RotCave artifacts are envelopes and requests, not narrative content.

POL003_RequireSchemaRef.description: All reaperContractsRequest artifacts must conform to their schema and carry schemaRef.

POL004_RequireTargetMetadata.description: Requests must include objectKind, tier, and desired invariant bands to drive routing decisions.

POL006_RequireRoutingSpineRef.description: All Reaper routing must resolve against the routing spine and never guess repo destinations.

authoringHints.summary: Use this repo for internal Reaper routing and request envelopes that interface with the routing spine.
aiBehavior: Do not generate content contracts here; only reaperContractsRequest and internal routing artifacts.
Use the routing spine to turn objectKind and tier into repo and schemaRef before writing any request.
Treat this repo as an internal engine bridge between Reaper logic and the constellation routing layer.
